zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping於1408年出生在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登時，他的父親Sir John Tyrrell27歲，母親Alice Coggeshall26歲。他於大約1444年與Margaret Darcy在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年2月23日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping于1408年出生在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登时，他的父亲Sir John Tyrrell27岁，母亲Alice Coggeshall26岁。他于大约1444年与Margaret Darcy在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1462年2月23日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping was born in 1408, in East Horndon, Essex, England, his father, Sir John Tyrrell, was 27 and his mother, Alice Coggeshall, was 26. He married Margaret Darcy about 1444, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 February 1462, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping est né en 1408, à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Tyrrell, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Coggeshall, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Darcy environ 1444, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 février 1462, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping 1408 in East Horndon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Tyrrell 27 und seine Mutter Alice Coggeshall 26. Er hat um 1444 in England Margaret Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1462 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping è nato il nel 1408 nel East Horndon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Tyrrell, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Coggeshall, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Darcy circa 1444, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1462, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Tyrrell of Gippingが1408年にイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Tyrrellは27歳，母Alice Coggeshallは26歳であった。約1444年にイギリスでMargaret Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年2月23日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping(이)가 1408년 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Tyrrell(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Coggeshall(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1444년 영국에서 Margaret Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 2월 23일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping nasceu em 1408, em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Tyrrell, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Coggeshall, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Darcy aproximadamente 1444, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1462, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping родился в 1408 г. в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Tyrrell было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Coggeshall, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Darcy около 1444 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 февраля 1462 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping nació en 1408, en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Tyrrell, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice Coggeshall, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Darcy aproximadamente 1444, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1462, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
